0.text: Larger areas of consolidation in the basal segments of the lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: New areas of consolidation in the right middle lobe

2.text: New areas of consolidation in the inferior lingular segment of the left upper lobe

3.text: Diffuse subsegmental atelectatic changes in both lungs
